User Guide¶

Welcome to News_Portal! This guide will help you get started and make the most of the platform.

Registration¶

  • You can register as a Reader, Editor, or Journalist.

  • Choose your role during sign-up. Each role has different permissions and features.

Roles & Features¶

Reader: - View approved articles and newsletters. - Subscribe to publishers and journalists for updates. - Comment on articles.

Journalist: - Write and submit articles and newsletters. - Articles/newsletters are sent for editor approval before publication. - Manage your own newsletters.

Editor: - Review, edit, and approve articles and newsletters. - Manage publication workflow and ensure content quality.

Password Reset¶

  • Use the password reset feature if you forget your password.

  • Receive a secure reset link via email.

API Integration¶

  • Access articles, newsletters, and user management via RESTful API endpoints.

  • Authenticate using token-based authentication (JWT or DRF Token).

Article Approval Workflow¶

  • Journalists submit articles/newsletters.

  • Editors review, edit, and approve content.

  • Approved content is published and sent to subscribers.

Support¶

  • For help, contact your site administrator or refer to the API documentation for technical details.

Enjoy using News_Portal!

News_Portal
